Reference to experimental CodeSystem http://medcomfhir.dk/ig/terminology/CodeSystem/medcom-messaging-eventCodes|1.5.0

There are multiple different potential matches for the url 'http://medcomfhir.dk/ig/core/StructureDefinition/medcom-core-patient'. It might be a good idea to fix to the correct version to reduce the likelihood of a wrong version being selected by an implementation/implementer, or use the [IG Parameter `pin-canonicals`](https://hl7.org/fhir/tools/CodeSystem-ig-parameters.html). Using version '2.3.0', found versions: 2.0.0 (from medcom.fhir.dk.core#2.0.0), 2.3.0 (from medcom.fhir.dk.core#2.3.0). Suggested fix: change the canonical reference from 'http://medcomfhir.dk/ig/core/StructureDefinition/medcom-core-patient' to 'http://medcomfhir.dk/ig/core/StructureDefinition/medcom-core-patient|2.3.0'

It might be a good idea to fix to the correct version to reduce the likelihood of a wrong version being selected by an implementation/implementer, or use the [IG Parameter `pin-canonicals`](https://hl7.org/fhir/tools/CodeSystem-ig-parameters.html). There are multiple different potential matches for the url 'http://medcomfhir.dk/ig/terminology/ValueSet/medcom-hospitalNotification-encounterStatus'. It might be a good idea to fix to the correct version to reduce the likelihood of a wrong version being selected by an implementation/implementer, or use the [IG Parameter `pin-canonicals`](https://hl7.org/fhir/tools/CodeSystem-ig-parameters.html). Using version '1.5.0', found versions: 1.1.1 (from medcom.fhir.dk.terminology#1.1.1), 1.4.0 (from medcom.fhir.dk.terminology#1.4.0), 1.5.0 (from medcom.fhir.dk.terminology#1.5.0). Error in constraint 'medcom-hospitalNotification-1' with expression 'entry.ofType(MessageHeader).all(resource.conformsTo('http://medcomfhir.dk/fhir/hospitalnotification/StructureDefinition/medcom-hospitalNotification-messageHeader'))': Error evaluating FHIRPath expression: The name 'resource' is not valid for any of the possible types: [http://hl7.org/fhir/StructureDefinition/MessageHeader] (@char 33)

Error in constraint 'medcom-hospitalNotification-3' with expression 'entry.ofType(Provenance).all(resource.activity.memberOf('http://medcomfhir.dk/fhir/dk-medcom-terminology/ValueSet/medcom-hospitalNotification-messageActivities'))': Error evaluating FHIRPath expression: The name 'resource' is not valid for any of the possible types: [http://hl7.org/fhir/StructureDefinition/Provenance] (@char 30)

medcom-hospitalNotification-4: The left side is inherently a collection, and so the expression 'entry.resource.ofType(Patient).identifier.system = 'urn:oid:1.2.208.176.1.2'' may fail or return false if there is more than one item in the content being evaluated

medcom-hospitalNotification-5: The left side is inherently a collection, and so the expression 'Bundle.entry.resource.ofType(MessageHeader).destination.extension.value.code = 'primary'' may fail or return false if there is more than one item in the content being evaluated
The slice definition for MessageHeader.destination:primary.extension has a minimum of 0 but the slices add up to a minimum of 1
The slice definition for MessageHeader.destination:cc.extension has a minimum of 0 but the slices add up to a minimum of 1
